prompt:
---Task---
Extract entities and relationships from the input text in Data to be Processed below.

---Instructions---
1.  **Strict Adherence to Format:** Strictly adhere to all format requirements for entity and relationship lists, including output order, field delimiters, and proper noun handling, as specified in the system prompt.
2.  **Output Content Only:** Output *only* the extracted list of entities and relationships. Do not include any introductory or concluding remarks, explanations, or additional text before or after the list.
3.  **Completion Signal:** Output `<|COMPLETE|>` as the final line after all relevant entities and relationships have been extracted and presented.
4.  **Output Language:** Ensure the output language is English. Proper nouns (e.g., personal names, place names, organization names) must be kept in their original language and not translated.

---Data to be Processed---
<Entity_types>
["Person","Creature","Organization","Location","Event","Concept","Method","Content","Data","Artifact","NaturalObject"]

<Input Text>
```
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Hey Joanna! Long time no see! What's up? Anything fun going on?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Hey Nate! Long time no see! I've been working on a project lately - it's been pretty cool. What about you - any fun projects or hobbies?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Hey Joanna! That's cool! I won my first video game tournament last week - so exciting!"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Wow Nate! Congrats on winning! Tell me more - what game was it?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Thanks! it's a team shooter game."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Wow, great job! What was is called?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "The game was called Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, and me and my team had a blast to the very end!"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Cool, Nate! Sounds like a fun experience, even if I'm not into games."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Cool, Nate! So we both have similar interests. What type of movies do you like best?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "I love action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool! What about you, what's your favorite genre?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "I'm all about dramas and romcoms. I love getting immersed in the feelings and plots."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Wow, movies can be so powerful! Do you have any recommendations for me?"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Yeah, totally! Have you seen this romantic drama that's all about memory and relationships? It's such a good one."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Oh cool! I might check that one out some time soon! I do love watching classics."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Yep, that movie is awesome. I first watched it around 3 years ago. I even went out and got a physical copy!"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Sounds cool! Have you seen it a lot? sounds like you know the movie well!"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "A few times. It's one of my favorites! I really like the idea and the acting."
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Nate said: "Cool! I'll definitely check it out. Thanks for the recommendation!"
[7:31 pm on 21 January, 2022] Joanna said: "No problem, Nate! Let me know if you like it!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Hey Nate! Haven't talked in a few days. Crazy things happened to me!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Hi Joanna! Long time no see! What's been going on? You sound excited!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Woo! I finally finished my first full screenplay and printed it last Friday. I've been working on for a while, such a relief to have it all done!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Wow, that sounds awesome! What's it about? Glad it's all down!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks, Nate! It's a mix of drama and romance!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Wow, that's amazing! How do you feel now that it's finished? Do you have any new plans for it?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Woohoo, Nate! I'm feeling a rollercoaster of emotions - relief, excitement, some anxiety - over finishing this project. Now I'm gonna submit it to some film festivals and (hopefully) get producers and directors to check it out. Here's hoping!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Congrats, Joanna! That sounds like a wild experience. Rock on and I hope they love it!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks Nate! A mix of emotions for sure. Hopefully, it leads to positive feedback and new opportunities."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Yeah, for sure. Hoping for the best! I like having some of these little ones around to keep me calm when things are super important and I'm nervous."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Awww! How long have you had them?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "I've had them for 3 years now and they bring me tons of joy!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "They sure lookl like they do! Adorable!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Thanks! The turtles might be small, but both sure have big personalities. I really reccomend having something like these little guys for times of stress."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Good idea, Nate! I'll think about it and maybe get pets of my own soon if I can find any I'm not allergic to. Have you been up to anything recently?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Yeah actually! I start to hang out with some people outside of my circle at the tournament. They're pretty cool!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Oh? That sounds sweet! Is it a weird relationship with them being competitors and all?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Oh, kind of. Some people are more competitive then others, so I tend to just stick around the more chill people here."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "That makes sense! Are you gonna cheer them on even if you lose?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Absolutely! I don't expect to win big here, I just like playing for fun!  You mentioned you were allergic to pets earlier, how bad is it?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Oh, its really bad. My face gets all puffy and itchy when I'm around certain animals, so I've always just stayed away."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Sorry to hear that. Allergies can be tough. What specifically are you allergic to?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "I'm allergic to most reptiles and animals with fur. It can be a bit of a drag, but I find other ways to be happy."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Awesome! There are lots of things that can bring you joy without pets. What else brings you joy?"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Writing and hanging with friends! That way I can express myself through stories, or just have a good time with people."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "That's great to hear! Those are both great things. I'm glad to hear you've got other things to help you get through times of axiousness despite not being able to have animals!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks, Nate! Writing helps me create wild worlds with awesome characters. Plus, it's a great way to express my feelings. I can't imagine life without it."
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Nate said: "Wow, Joanna, that sounds amazing! Keep doing what you love!"
[2:01 pm on 23 January, 2022] Joanna said: "Thanks, Nate! I'll definitely keep pursuing my passion for writing. It means a lot."
```
